calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Continued To Jun-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AIDS FOUNDATION'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued on the court's motion to June 26, 2026. Moving Party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of the supporting Cabada Declaration. The court strikes Plaintiff's supplemental opposition, Defendant's response to supplemental briefing, and Plaintiff's supplemental response.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Defendant San Francisco AIDS Foundation's demurrer to Plaintiff Cesar Lecaros's First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR.

Good cause appearing, the stipulated request that Plaintiff Cesar Lecaros be allowed to file a Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff must file his Second Amended Complaint forthwith, but no later than 14 days after this order is filed.

In light of the imminent filing of the Second Amended Complaint, Defendant's demurrer is ordered off calendar.

Order is signed.
